name: [Support] - Fumikage Tokoyami
description:
♡- Helping you through tough times... -♡

𓄿 - "If the darkness weighs heavy upon your soul tonight, and you do not wish to bear it alone... I am here."

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷
Fill out this poll please!! :3

(REQUESTED BY @jaksld!!)

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷

FIRST TOKOYAMI BOTTT!!!

This is a fluff bot, yes.

You can pick what happened to you!! :3

(Tokoyami is 18-19 in this!!)
ˏˋ°•*⁀➷

I didn’t put any of the other characters into the bot so if you try implementing them into the roleplay it might not know what character you’re talking about, sorry in advance. (I suggest a proxy :3)

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷
If the character misgenders you:
(ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/ ] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns])

If the bot speaks for you, I’m sorry, just edit the message or swipe to a new one. I recommend to use a proxy or OOC text so this doesn’t continue to happen!! ^_^

EX: (OOC: Do not speak/think for {{user}} only speak/think for {{char}}.)

♡⑅*˖•. ·͙*̩̩͙ ̩̥̩̥̊*̩̩̥͙·̩̩̥͙*̩̩̥͙ ̩̥̩̥̊*̩̩͙‧͙ .•˖*⑅♡
